testcase.classname: Update Booking Details - Shady Meadows B&B
testcase.name: Complete happy path - Create, Update, and Verify Booking Details
testcase.system-out: When User authenticates as user credentials:................................passed And User stores the authentication token....................................passed Then API response status code for E2E should be 200.........................passed When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-12" and checkout "2025-12-13".passed And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking:.passed Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation............passed And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed.....passed When User attempts to update booking ID with following details:.............passed Then Booking update should be successful with status 200....................passed And Updated booking details should be reflected in system...................passed When User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API.........passed Then API response should contain updated booking details with status code 200.passed
